privileged_info_summary: Completed PI audit for autopsy_env cloud_return_logical_analysis task. Verified that the primary evidence comes from real forensic test data downloaded from DFTT (Digital Forensic Tool Testing images), which is then extracted via tsk_recover into the expected /home/ga/evidence/Cloud_Return directory. Confirmed all target files (logical_catalog.tsv, cloud_summary.txt) and the required Autopsy case name ('Cloud_Return_2024') match the task descriptions and export script queries. Additionally, discovered that while the task description explicitly requests the case number 'INV-CLD-001', the verifier and export scripts completely fail to enforce or check this field.
